reviews.review_text:
Stayed in cabins while exploring the Walk the Yorkes Hiking Trail.
Great location - close to neighbouring seaside towns and walking distance to Brewery, Cafes and main street.
Easy booking and friendly staff. Stayed in Villa, was clean and spacious. Had a great stay. Nice for a quiet get away.

Another great stay at this lovely park. Clean amenities, well kept grounds and great service. Well located to explore the Yorke Peninsula. We choose to stay in the family cabins which have all the basics for a comfortable stay.  Great for long weekend getaways!!
The deluxe cabin was clean and comfortable with everything that you would need. Easy check-in.
Clean, organised park with good facilities in a great town that is well serviced.

My wife and I stayed 2 nights in an accessible villa and were really stunned by it. The place was spotlessly clean, there was ample hanging space in wardrobes. plenty of room to move about and al the appliances were high end products. Before and at arrival we had loads of information from the park and were in no doubt as to what we might be able to do and whee we might like to go. All in all we had a lovely stay and would happily return to this park.

Clean well maintained park with large caravan sites.
Would recommend

We really enjoyed our stay at your park.Amy was very friendly and was always available to assist when needed. A nice quiet location to relax and unwind. Very tidy park with very clean amenities. Thanks for hosting us
Great little spot on Yorkes

Was my first time back in the town iwas born in 54 years ago returned to see the place OF Minlaton the Caravan  Pk was very helpful  as I turned up inmy little silver Toyota  Yaris from Townsville Queensland they had accommodation  i should have booked ahead as it was Christmas  time but they found me a nice onsite van until.a villa was free the park manager and grounds worker cleaners etc
Should be commended extremely  clean toilets showers grounds emasculate the manager was a real lovely helpful young woman my stay was about two weeks nice quiet and relaxing can walk To town if you wish to I intend to comeback 💯 %+ a great
The staff are amazing credit to the Minlaton
Caravan Park i fully recommend a stay short or long great park great town
Thank you so much for making me feel so welcomed
Brett Treloar

We had a Villa Cabin. 2 bedrooms. Cabin was roomy with everything we needed. The cabin was toward the back of the park but far enough away from the main road to not be bothered by noise. Camp kitchen is large and kept clean.

Another comfortable stay at Minlaton caravan park for the Easter weekend. Great central location to the sights on central Yorke Peninsula! the staff treated us to pancakes 🥞 on Easter Saturday. A treat!
Loved the added touch of Easter eggs on the pillows !
Beautiful clean park with friendly staff. Centrally located for trips either side of the Penninsula.
What a great caravan park.  We stayed in one the villas, all we can say is ..... superb. Thus is the second time we have has a stay.  Everything is close by.  Definitely recommend a stay
Room enough for the whole and extended family. Owners very friendly and deal with any issues quickly. One of our favourite places to stay.
Very clean cabin and great place to stay 👌Host were friendly

Such a lovely little park. We had a great grassy site with plenty of room. The camp kitchen is a fantastic space and amenities are clean.
A great base to explore the Yorke from.

On Thursday night (after hours) we called as we were stuck and your staff were absolutely amazing!
Helped us with a room and explained how to get in etc.
The Villa was beautiful and the kids loved it.
Could not fault anything, even with such a quick stay!
Lovely spot for a long weekend

Staff were so friendly & helpful, room was lovely, smelled really nice, very clean & gad everything you need for a pleasant self contained stay. Also had a camo kitchen on site that was really well looked after

Clean cabins...great shower!
Pretty well equipped...could've done with a dish 'scrubber' to clean frypan.
Appreciated the Hair-dryer and bathroom products...bodywash, shampoo and conditioner!
Air-conditioning and heating unit worked well.
Booking was easy & centrally located I will book again.
We had a very enjoyable stay in our caravan. The park is very well maintained and is situated close to all shops and facilities.
Good location to visit the southern end of yhe Yorke Pen. Amenities were clean and large grassy sites.
One of the best caravan parks we have stayed at. Great sites with good clean amenities and the camp kitchen was fantastic
Very nice park with good amenities. Walking distance to the town centre and the brewery.
Great Location, friendly staff, Very happy with the Accommodation's Thank you
Top place. I didn't want for a thing. Would do it again....

Absolutely amazing experience.
The villa we stayed in was beautiful and very well equipped.
Thanks
Doug and Des
Nice grassy site. Easy walk into town. Friendly and accommodating staff.

An excellent place to stay. We stayed for 2 nights recently in a cabin with all necessary equipment required. The staff at the park were helpful and friendly. The location was quiet and peaceful! 😄                               Thankyou Amy  /  Glenn

Another great stay at Minlaton caravan park
Unfortunate weather turned a bit on last day
Excellent amenities & tidy grounds
Great staff & service
Location very handy to drive to all towns of York peninsula & Innes nations l park etc
Plenty local shopping
One of the best kept campsites I’ve been to always friendly and always clean won’t disappoint. But would be great to have a pool for those extremely hot days. Nice and quiet area.

Centre-ish of town ... very central to all.
Walking distance to Watsacowie Brewery ..initially thought being close to major intersection that it was going to be noisy ...  ssooo happy to be proven wrong ... clean amenities,  clean caravan parking areas and staff that you could have a bit of banter with ...
No complaints here and would return, no problems..
Thank you

Great spot, green grass, shade, large sites, easy to reverse into. Amenities and general area well maintained.Central to both the east and west coasts of Yorke Peninsula. Quiet, clean and well maintained. TV reception has been improved. Kui Park. Thanks to the owners/management.

Uncomplicated online booking, constant communication from the Park Managers with detailed instructions re check in etc. Spotlessly clean cabin.  Great location within walking distance of Watsacowie brewery, eateries and the Minlaton Hotel. A perfect 24 hours spent. Thankyou Minlaton.. highly recommended!
Me gusto mucho! Lo único que podría decir de malo que los baños están muy lejos de los unpowered sites y solo hay uno en todo el camping.
Absolutely stunning villa with everything you need. Never had such a comfortable bed while travelling.
Stayed for work, very clean and tidy cabins! Has everything you need, I enjoyed my time here.
We were a group of 3 people and we had a lovely stay at Minlaton Caravan Park. The villa was very well equipped and clean. Also, all the caravan park looks organized and clean
Stayed on a powered site for 3 nights, great park with the cleanest of amenities and friendly staff. Walking distance to hotel with a great meal.
Needed a base to explore the southern Yorke Peninsula and Minlaton CP was perfect.
Great park in the middle of the peninsula, very very well maintained and great service
We had a good time at Minlaton Caravan Park! Comfortable place to stay and everything is clean.

Wonderful caravan park, close to the main town. Large, grassy, shaded sites that are well maintained. Spotless ammenities. Walking distance to Watsacowie Brewery.
We loved our 3 day stay.

Amy is so nice and friendly. We were given the best site for our caravan. Nice and quiet at night. Had great sleep and woken up by bird chirping. Had successful fishing trips to spots near Minlaton and enjoyed exploring beautiful York peninsula. Great stay! Thank you Amy
A great little park. Excellent camp kitchen. Well maintained & close to the 5 star brewery! Bingo at the bowlo was fun too! 20min drive to peninsula beaches.

I had booked and paid for a cabin and two grassed areas for 5 nights from 28/12/25 to 2/1/26. Both grassed sites had sprinklers that were obviously on timers and my daughter had called on the first night to advise and were told that they would be switched off during our stay. Other patrons also had same issue theirs turned off but not ours. Tents and extended rooms of camper trailer got drenched including power banks used to service my car fridge n freezer. Both turned off overnight so had to discard contents- not happy. This park is not child friendly more suited for retired couples. Kids Unable to enjoy their holiday as getting told off for being ‘too noisy’ before 7pm. In the rules it stipulated noise to be controlled by 10pm. Communal showers and toilets were clean. ‘Games room’ consisted of connect four blocks and domino’s and that was it. Nothing for teenagers. No playground had to walk over the busy road for the younger kids. Unable to wash cars down after being on nearby beaches ‘manager stated ‘not a car wash, it’s in the rules’ despite being on the lawn area. Left a day early  won’t stay again.
Great place to relax in your caravan. Very clean park
It's a great central location to everything for the southern peninsula. Very clean and tidy.
Lovely Park very relaxing
Find another place to camp.
This a nice and well maintained caravan park. Our microwave wasn't working but it replaced the very next day. Amy was a pleasure to deal with.
Quiet, no frills, good quality short term accommodation. My favourite place to stay on the Yorke Peninsula.
We stay at this CP all the time. The CP is fantastic. Very peaceful and the perfect location. The owners and all staff are always so friendly. In my view one of the best CP's on the Yorke.

This was my second visit and was again in Villa 1. Everything from the check in instructions to the checkout was perfect. The villas are very quiet, comfortable and immaculately clean.
Great location for town and the brewery.
Can’t wait to visit again.

Great Setup
Convenient Location
Noice People

Nice quiet caravan.
Large lawned sites
Clean facilities.
Large clean camp kitchen

A fantastic place to just chill and relax 3 mins walk to town and 10/15mins drive to different area of the yourks this was our 6th visit the staff are just amazing and welcoming will definitely be back again soon
We stayed here for one night while visiting the area.  Check in was very easy, great communication, a clean cabin and a nice clean park.

We had a nice grassed large caravan site near the enormous and well fitted out camp kitchen. Everything there spotless -  as were nearby toilets.
It’s not a park full of playgrounds etc (they might be on the way) so very easy going for the quiet life.  The new units looked fantastic and very modern. The owners must have grand plans to improve the park.
Minlaton is in the centre of YP and within easy reach of other seaside towns.
An hour or so from Moonta Bay.
We stayed three nights over a weekend and it was surprising how many caravans and campers were there. Great to see. Obviously gaining a good reputation and well deserved with industry acknowledgment by taking out bronze in recent SA tourism awards. Best wishes for the future.
Very clean park, amenities very clean. Easy to find. Great location. Friendly staff.

We are very happy with our stay at Milaton caravan park.so laid back clean and tidy park.and the staff are unbelivable.they welcomed us  and made the help we needed so many thanks we realy enjoyed our stay thank you so much.we will be back defently michael & christine !!
What a great little park very clean very friendly. Can’t kitchen was great and clean. Nothing was a problem and the town was great. Would highly recommend it.

Thank you for being so accommodating to our requests.
Very clean cabin with comfy beds. Best thing close to my brother’s and Watsacowie🍻
Thanks again!
Stayed on a powered site no. 2, nice grass area and large, amenities clean. Great value, especially if you're a member. Walking distance to Watsocowie Brewery, that's a bonus!
Enjoyed our stay. Cabin was very comfortable and park is well maintained.
Clean, fresh room. Fully self contained. TV reception not that great, that's the only flaw.
Great location to town , clean and tidy park , owners friendly and very helpful, will definitely be back , sites large enough for us ,

A+++++ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Quiet park,  very clean.  Owners very friendly.
Would recommend 200% . We will be back. 🤓
So impressed with our villa clean neat and comfortable having the ramp and disabled access bathroom made our stay even more special thankyou amy and glenn

Lovely quiet Caravan Park, easy access to Yorke Peninsula towns. Beautiful lawns, very well kept park. Pet Cabin Lovely for 2 plus 1 dog. Would have been nice with a small couch. We stayed 7 days and will definitely be back. Love Minlaton.

We had a last minute overnight trip to Yorke Peninsula so were fortunate to find a vacancy at the Minlaton Caravan Park. The communication from the management was prompt and clear for late book in and the cabin was extremely clean with enough equipment for cooking in. There was plenty of crockery and pots and pans too. I also appreciated the refillable toiletries rather than the little tubes and soaps. The Park is right in the middle of the town so it’s an easy place to find and base yourself. We would happily stay here again.

We had a gravel powered site, for five days, which was huge. Beautiful clean park, Amy and Glen could not be more friendlier. Your camp kitchen is amazing clean and had everything you need. The toilets and showers were spot less and always smelt clean. The Park is a credit to you both will definitely be back.
2nd time back to Minlaton Caravan park, plenty of space, camp kitchen facilities fantastic and feel very safe. Another bonus centre of great spots on the Yorkes. We will be back 😉

Always a pleasure to stay here for work travel
Will be back
Thanks Gus from CHM Group

It is not my habit to give 5 stars but we have been returning to Minlaton Caravan Park for several years now.

It is an ideal location for Southern Yorke Peninsula. My interactions with the staff has always been good.
Had a great weekend beautiful big grassed site and clean amenities. A short walk to Watsacowie brewery
Beautiful  spot to stay. Very peaceful
Buying an onsite van at the park it's a lovely quiet caravan park perfect for relaxing
Had an absolutely wonderful time thankyou for the extension to be honest didn't want to leave IGA very well stocked great bakery and lovely coffee shops all within walking distance
Cabin was spotless , I was allowed to check in early , very friendly owners and I could walk to Watsacowie .
Had everything we needed. Was clean and well kept. Will definitely stay again

I was lucky enough to stay in one of the brand new villas this time around. They are very nicely appointed and have plenty of room for a family or group of friends. Nice alfresco area overlooking nicely manicured lawns.
But overall, I have stayed on numerous occasions and always found Minlaton Caravan Park to have all the facilities you need and have always found them very clean.

We had a relaxing time last week with our 5 day stay ,all staff were friendly & helpful  & all amenities were very clean .
Great caravan park & central to travel to both sides of the gulf.
Would definitely stay there again.
Thank You all.
From Denise & Vince
Such an awesome park. Fantastic service, easy booking system. Scones on arrival....who else does that? Really top notch. Great location. Amenities modern and clean. Cannot fault this park. Well done.

Villas was home from home
Very spacious fukkyvequioed highly recommend

Great caravan site plenty of room on site for van and ute. Clean amenities, friendly staff. Good spot to place ones self to enjoy the York Peninsular. Fantastic brewery easy walk from park. Would definitely visit again.
Couldn't fault to much Cabin clean and cosy 👌I will be back Thankyou 👍

I stayed in a powered site so there is no star for rooms. The park is excellent well looked after very clean amenities, beautiful camp kitchen location is great especially for the people who don’t have vehicles to drive it’s within 5 minutes walk to the main street
Clean cabin and easy check in process. Will definitely be back

Had a wonderful nights stay in the very luxurious new villa at Minlaton Caravan Park. Hosts were so helpful and nothing was to much trouble. Highly recommend this stop over. So convenient to see many spots from Park all over the Peninsula.
Wonderful, stay, highly recommend!

This was our 2nd stay in Minlaton Caravan Park.
Amy & Glenn manage their Caravan Park very well.
We love the location of the Park which is walking distance from most things.
Especially Watsacowie Brewing Company which is just down the street.
We enjoyed a weekend in Minlaton recently & we’re pleasantly surprised to be upgraded to a villa. Fantastic accommodation, would highly recommend.
Great staff and central location to check out all of the Yorke Peninsula
Beautiful park , really well maintained and friendly. I am glad we stumbled onto this one ☝️

I feel I should review even though we didn’t stay. I booked and prepaid for a 2 night stay.. when I called to explain that we couldn’t make it because of car troubles Amy showed no empathy for our situation. I was told that I was not eligible for a refund or credit. The terms and conditions set by the park are discretionary.  I should have received at least 1 night refund.

Good value for money, clean ensuite cabin and a friendly park. Lots of rain on our visit but looking forward to checking out the Main Street and Brewery next time. Must also mention the good breakfast and coffee at the Grand Olde Cafe on the Main Street.
Beautiful, well presented, clean caravan Park and cabins.
We love minlanton caravan park
Great place clean big open kitchen everything in walking distance .
Beautiful quiet park with large sites close to town.

Was very cold but our van site was  lose to the amenities.
Was great for day trips.
This was an amazing place to stay. The villa was beautiful with plenty of room and everything you need in it. Price wasnt too bad either, Highly recommend

Great large sites, thankful for toliets near camp kitchen.  Disappointed no hot water in camp kitchen.  Unfortunately my aerial cable not long enough or my hose to reach opposite  side connection. Look forward returning. Thankyou

A very neat park well set out, not everything in straight lines.  A. Very short walk into town

Their new villas look amazing

Amenities and park very clean, perfect location if your wanting to do the whole of the peninsula.
Very enjoyable stay.
A lovely caravan park with spotless amenities. Close to shops. Had 3 very enjoyable nights here in this lovely quiet park.
Great stay lovely park
Friendly staff. Great customer service., would highly recommend

Great little caravan park. Clean, tidy and central.
Communication with the owners was great and the cabin we stayed in perfect for our needs. Very clean.
Will be back!

We had a powered site with our caravan. Very friendly couple. and really easy to book in. Very close and within walking  to pubs and Watsacowie Brewery , shops and cafes. The amenities were very clean and tidy.  Camp kitchen was very clean and tidy. Will definately go back there again.

Great location to explore the whole of the peninsula from

Park is quite and comfortable
Great little cabin, great amenities and handy to town. Easy check in/out. Would definitely recommend.
Good size grassy and shaded sites. Clean facilities. Excellent location

Lovely & quiet, pet friendly, no kids were there which suits us as a mature couple. We stayed on site 1 in our caravan, not sure if our location was good for wifi but reception was brilliant. There is a tree with a wasp nest on site 1/2 but we just ignored them and they didn’t bother us but maybe it needs attention.
Amenities need an upgrade but were lovely & clean and they smelt clean. The campsite is well kept and clean. BBQ was clean. Great location for Watsacowie brewery.

Very comfortable campsite
I feel safe when I stayed here for 4 nights
The kitchen and bathroom are good and clean
the unpowered site is very spacious but not much glass on the ground and it’s very hard to put the pegs in
I like the fish cleaning spot, it’s very convenient to clean the stuffs and kill the fish
The unpowered site is $30-35 per night for 2ppl, it’s cheap
And I suggest that charge 1 ppl for $20-25 per night
I will be very happy to come every month😃
Strongly recommend to others
Decent location, staff were very slow and waited almost 30min to get service. Location is amazing, and accommodation is what you expect for the price
Excellent place to stay. Staff were lovely, close to everything you need, grounds and villas were very neat and tidy.
Great caravan park with clean amenities. Very reasonable rates and friendly staff. Central location within easy drive to explore the York Peninsula
Great location and amenities.  Staff are so welcoming and helpful.
Great much improved park, nice grassy sites, spotless amenities, friendly owners and a great bakery.

Our favourite park to stay on the Yorke Peninsula,  park is clean, green and accommodating, sites are spacious,  amenities are spotless, love the new camp kitchen, staff are lovely as always,  we will definitely be back

Great little park and very centrally located so you can explore the whole of the bottom of the Yorke Peninsula without moving the van. Amenities and the park grounds are beautifully presented and the price is awesome. Short walk into town for everything you need to restock. Friendly hosts and support staff.
The villas are lovely.
Fantastic
We had a powered site which was great

Room was great. We had a villa which could sleep six and there was only two of us, so plenty of room. Clean and accessible. Staff was virtually invisible, but available. Internet was intermittent, but this is not the Caravan Parks fault I wouldn't have thought. Would definitely stay here again. The town is lovely .
Very close to the Ocean and creek, great walks.

We had a lovely stay here in our Caravan.    Amenities are very clean and staff are very friendly and obliging.  Great central location at reasonable rates to stay and explore the rest of the peninsula.  Camp kitchen was large and also good.
Great small park centrally located on the York. Clean and great camp kitchen. Close to shops.
Always a great place to stay
Well both loved your caravan park, great location lovely town.

Great small caravan park. Large grassed sites, plenty of shade, peaceful and relaxing ☺️
Ammenities are old but spotless, would definitely return.
Great caravan park Grassy area Very clean ammenities Fabulous camp kitchen Barbecues spotless Short walk into town Highly recommend
Stayed in cheaper cabin, overall fair years of use showing in areas, but can see great effort is being made to upgrade facilities as a whole so expect them to be refurbished in the future.

Very clean.tidy and well set up.
Great service,very helpfull.

park is tidy, very out dated. cabins had rat sack on cutlery and over all not well presented. customer service was very poor in having no staff on campgrounds for majority of day, woke up to van wet as sprinklers had been placed on early in the morning.
Informed owners was told it was unfortunate. good location though i suppose.
Very neat caravan park with good amenities. Nice and close to town 👍Picked up a van purchased locally and stayed for one night and was quiet
It was a very clean and tidy caravan park. You had lots of space for caravan and car, we will be back

Great place to stay, central to the lower part of the peninsula and very easy to do day trips from and use the caravan park as a base. Also a short walk to Watsacowie Brewery so very convenient. Clean facilities, quiet, nice green grass and dog friendly!
Good spot
Well maintained, spacious, & quiet caravan park. Clean facilities, microwave & fridge at the camp kitchen. Would stay again if passing through.

Wikicamps advertised green grass sites & good tv reception. Green sites, yes, but only a handful.
Tv only in certain areas unless you wanted to buy a cable from reception. TV antennas placed around the park.
The sites are big & a great camp kitchen.
Maybe a trip to Kadina Caravan Park to see how the grounds are managed in the dry.
We all had great time. Very friendly staff who could not do enough for us. Very clean highly recommend them to anybody looking for great accommodation

This was our 3rd visit. We love it as it's very well maintained, clean and friendly.
The caravan grass sites are huge that are very good value for money.
The location is perfect for taking day trips throughout the beautiful York Peninsula.
It's also walking distance to the fabulous Whatsacowie Brewery. We'll be back!

Nice and quite camp site, suitable for older generation. If you have kids, they might be bored as there is no playground, pool or kids facilities. Bathroom and toilets are downside as there are only 2 bathroom and 3 toilets for the big campsite. Beside that we had a good night camp there.
Staff was friendly, the site was as described, we had a whale of a time, and there were a few cute dogs we got to pet. 10/10 would go again for sure

Stayed on a grass powered site and was very impressed with how well maintained the whole park was. A second lot of toilets and showers were available near where we camped.  😁
The camp kitchen was kept very clean and checked daily.
Dogs are welcome. 🐾

This is our go to base camp with the caravan when we come to YP.  Great park, clean, really well maintained. Friendly. We'll be back
Thanks Glen, Aimee and Geoff..

Needed a few camp sites on very short notice.
Rang after hours and they returned my phone call booking us all in for that night.
Very friendly and helpful.  The park was extremely clean and well maintained.
Thanks again.
Had everything you would need. Lovely area.

Lovely spot in Minlaton. Clean toilets and showers. Nice grassed area for the caravan. Camp kitchen has BBQ, oven and microwave and games to play whilst waiting for your food to cook. Only nice addition would be some utensils and cooking pots. We had to extend our stay for an extra 2 nights due to car troubles and the staff were very obliging and helpful.

We combined a small business trip and holiday at Minlaton Caravan Park. Very well presented Park powered sites for our van was beautiful, and just a stone throw from the town and tourist sites.  Amenities were  great with hot showers  etc.. We'll be back over summer to spend some more time exploring this small community.
Loved our stay everything was great real grass to but your feet on.  A very short walk to the Watsacowie brewery  the best so far lots to try thanks Amy

We stayed at this incredible park as part of our Adventure All Stars TV Filming and Glenn & Amy hosted our group. The villas and cabins were exceptionally comfortable and the camp kitchen was probably the best one I’ve seen in any caravan park! It was close to many amazing places for us to visit and I look forward to coming back with friends and family. We had a ball. Thanks for having us!
Quiet and restful. Very clean and tidy. Lovely staff and helpful.

Stayed overnight for a work trip in the villas at Minlaton caravan park. Let me say that the villas rival any 4 star hotel room. Was blown away by the spaciousness, comfort and cleanliness of the rooms. Would highly recommend.

Booked a 2 Bedroom Villa.  It was very clean and spacious.             Situated in back corner of park,quiet area.Nice to sit out on the porch having dinner listening to the birds.   Excellent spot,easy walking distance to street. Good spot to base yourself to go to Ardrossan.  Pt Turton. Edithburgh.
Great place to stay
Enjoyed our stay. Second time staying. Nice big sites. Dog friendly. Close to beaches etc. One of the locals told us there is a playground and swimming pool in the future.
Excellent caravan site's neat and tidy
Really nice well priced caravan park that was spotlessly clean with huge grassy sites. Walking distance to everything,  especially the brewery.
Really lovely caravan park. Large grassed sites. Great and spotlessly clean amenities.  Great people running it.
A lovely park. So clean and staff are awesome.
Very good accommodation and excellent location with great service provided. Definitely recommend the Minlaton Caravan Park to any YP visitors.

We tented near the camp kitchen so had protection from the winds. The camp kitchen is great, amenities were spotless and it was in a great position - just a short walk to the shops. Highly recommend staying here.
We can't comment on the rooms, but the service and facilities were top notch. Great spot to explore York Peninsular.
Very accommodating when you are in a semitrailer & looking for a bed for the night
Lovely clean comfortable cabin. Close to centre of town. Everything was provided that I required.

Great spot to stay easy walk to main. Street shops , coffee and hotel and a realy
Great bakery
Caravan Park very tidy with a warm welcome and assistance Cabin well presented and clean
Could recommend to anyone wanting to explore YP from a central location

A lovely caravan park. Central location for many days trips on the Yorke.
The camp kitchen looks nice and modern but is not yet practical. Hopefully they will remedy this soon.
When camping you need to have cooking utensils, pans and such available for use. True campers do not have the space to carry these items like vans do. There was not even a scraper for the BBQ. The bbq did not great up enough to cook a steak. I tried both in the camp kitchen. If they supply a selection of items (op shops are cheap) their rating would be much better.
The shower pressure leaves you running in circles to get wet. Please fix this.
The staff was very good.
With a few minor upgrades this park will be more highly graded.
I will still recommend staying here.
We had a great stay. Very clean cabin and  park. The cabin was great for my family of four. Fully equipped kitchen. Very comfortable lounge and beds. Lovely staff. Will definitely be back.

Another excellent experience. The park is beautiful and ideal for anyone wanting to explore Yorke peninsula. The staff are fantastic...we had an issue when our hot water system broke, and the staff went above and beyond to get us into a new cabin. Thanks again!!!
Top class for a country park.

I live permanantly in the park and had an incredible discussion tonight with the unpowered site group that were here to pursue their inspection of the caves close to Curramulka - most had sore knees and were tired and filthy but still warmed up around the fire pit so many young people that are following their dream - and with a dad and his son - all at the fire pit/BBQ area - there are so many different and diverse personalities that visit - so many experiences and adventures and people to meet in and  around the park.

Really friendly owners. Easy on line booking. Clean tidy park with lots of facilities. We stayed in a cabin which was nicely appointed and spotless. The board games were a nice touch to have some good old fashioned screen free fun.
Clean, central to National Park, walking distance into towns cafes, hotel and shops.
Great park in a reasonable sized town.  Very clean facilities, large grassed sites and reasonably priced.
Lovely part of the peninsula. Lots to see and explore

This is a lovely park. Excellent upgraded facilities. As we were tenting we loved the new camp kitchen. The best we have seen. Also the renovated amenities block was very clean. It is obvious the owners are making a big effort here. The one issue we had was the very loud, intrusive noise from very large trucks accelerating past at 6am each morning. I measured several at |87 db above safe limits even for a commercial zone. We were situated next to the road. I suggest unpowered sites are placed elsewhere.

Great park but they need another ammenities block desperately especially over Easter.
Thought could also be given to placement of  couples and young families being placed together. A playground for the kids would be a great addition as well.

Such friendly staff here who guided me into my van site with ease. The lovely grassed areas are well kept thanks to the recycled water being used. The location is right on the township so I was able to easily walk the 2 blocks to the grocery store and post office. The amenities were very clean every day.

The park was very neat, well organised and with clean facilities. Very close to the heart of town with the shops only a very short walk away with the prominent and excellent display of the local hero across the road. Would stay in this park again.

Fantastic location - so handy to explore the Yorke Peninsula from this location.
Super campers kitchen
A nice size park and as an unpowered camper we could set up anywhere on the grass. We would definitely return.
Top place to stay, big sites, spotless amenities, good rates.
Very clean amenities, friendly service & staff. Handy to town & centrally located to the surrounding beaches/towns of the Yorke Peninsula. 😎

What a great park,  we enjoyed our stay here, we had a large grassy site which had heaps of room, friendly staff at check in, clean amenities block, hot showers. Easy walk into town and to shops, must drop in at the bakery. Would definitely recommend staying at this park.
A lovely caravan park
Great stay in my little camper thank you. Friendly country service, nice surrounds and reasonable rates. Will stay again some time thank you.
Great park, located 2 min walk into town. Good facilities, beautiful new cabins and gorgeous green grass on some van sites. Awesome camp kitchen.  Great stop

The experience from start to finish was fantastic. Friendly staff, Clean, well looked after grounds. Caravan site was a good size, we had our own caravan and booked a powered site.
Camp kitchen area, neat, clean & tidy.  Dog friendly on leash

Caravan Park
Unpowered site
We spent 6 days here. Great CP in a lovely town. Quiet park... not crowed and has excellent camp kitchen. It is a great place to stop and  explore the sights around the peninsula.

One male staff was a bit offside about parking. Could have requested first in a friendly manner where he wanted us park than waiting till we were fully setup and then saying he didn't like the way we parked. We parked close to nearby power and water access as you do. Still on our allocated site. Wasn't a good start.😞

Had 3 nights here late October. Very nice powered grassy pitch and great facilities. Location excellent to explore the bottom end of Yorke peninsula. Walking to town centre takes 2 mins and the other way for a 1 min walk you find an outstanding small craft brewery called Watsacowie.
We had a caravan site, the ameneties were clean and tidy. Staff friendly and only a 5 min walk into town. We used as a base to explore the Innes National park and surrounding towns.

The cabin presented as modern and spacious. It contained a wardrobe with hanging space and all the necessities. It presented as clean, tidy and spacious. The layout of the park was simple to navigate. Arriving after hours, all instructions were explained and easy to comprehend. Thank you for a wonderful weekend!
Very clean and comfortable

Great accomodation in a well layed out caravan park. The rooms are spacious and the bed was very comfortable. Had a great nights sleep.|Very easy to book and no problems at all with the check in process.
Love what yas done new villas beautifully done

Owners pleasant and accommodating to requests.  Cabins exactly as advertised.  Neat, clean and tidy.  Park facilities are excellent, well cared for and maintained.  Definitely recommend Minlaton Caravan Park as a central location to stay
made me stay in a caravan! 1 star
Great place to use as a base to explore the bottom of the York Peninsula
Well set out caravan park with generous sized sites  which are reasonably priced.  Brand new camp kitchen.  Amenities clean.  Short walk into town.  Highly recommended.
Nice caravan park, lots of sites and cabins, good size sites, nice camp kitchen clean amenities and very friendly staff. Also close to town.
